{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Inner Light Tempering elixir
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Inner Light Tempering elixir]] reinforces madra channels and promotes spiritual resilience in advanced [[sacred beasts]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7">''Waybound'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“The Inner Light Tempering elixir is intended to reinforce madra channels and promote spiritual resilience even in highly advanced sacred beasts."<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
